# 🐛 Bug Report\n\n## Description\nBriefly describe the bug you found.\n\n## Steps to Reproduce\n1. Step 1\n2. Step 2\n3. Step 3\n\n## Expected Behavior\nWhat *should* happen?\n\n## Actual Behavior\nWhat *actually* happens?\n\n## Screenshots\n_If helpful, add screenshots_\n\n## Environment\n- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]\n- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS, Windows]\n\n## Additional Context\nAnything else that might help us fix this?\n\n---\n\n_Thank you for helping improve Brotherhood!_\n"
